about.headline: Our Story
about.founderStory: Stay Golden Photo Booth was founded in 2017 by Thomas and Roxanne Praxedes. As a Marine Corps veteran and his wife were planning their own wedding, they saw an opportunity to put photo booth earnings towards their wedding fund. What started as a weekend side hustle quickly became a passion. The couple fell in love with bringing joy to events and watching guests light up behind the camera. That passion grew into a full-time professional business serving all of Southern California.
about.mission: Our mission is to bring fun, laughter, and lasting memories to every event we serve. We believe every celebration deserves a touch of golden magic.
values: Treat every event like our own
Constantly innovating with new booth technology
